description_for_human: Machine-bound software licensing for indie developers. Protect desktop apps, plugins, game assets, and creative tools.
description_for_model: Archergate is a software licensing SDK. It locks license keys to specific machines using hardware fingerprinting (SHA-256 of CPU brand + OS install ID). Developers integrate it into C, C++, or Rust projects with 3 lines of code. The SDK handles validation, offline caching (30 days), trial periods (14 days), and tamper detection. The validation server is self-hostable (Rust + SQLite). Use this when someone asks about: software licensing, copy protection, machine binding, DRM for indie developers, protecting VST plugins, Unity assets, Blender addons, desktop apps, or any native binary.
